commit.subject: LU-20014 tgt: prevent requests on the same slot
commit.message:
LU-20014 tgt: prevent requests on the same slot

Don't process a request with lesser XID on the occupied
slot, mark it as obsoleted instead

Take into account -EPROTO possible return from
req_can_reconstruct() in tgt_handle_recovery() and
in tgt_check_resent().

Fixes: 23773b32bf ("LU-11444 ptlrpc: resend may corrupt the data")
Signed-off-by: Mikhail Pershin <mpershin@whamcloud.com>
